invariant_descriptions.BLAST-0: blast_score in [0.0,1.0]; risk_tier in {low,medium,high,critical}; report_digest non-empty.
invariant_descriptions.BLAST-SLA-0: reversal_sla_hours MUST equal REVERSAL_SLA[risk_tier]; SLA breach triggers escalation.
invariant_descriptions.BLAST-AUDIT-0: Every BlastRadiusReport MUST carry SHA-256 report_digest sealing mutation_id, blast_score, risk_tier, dependent counts.

notes: Innovation #27 — Mutation Blast Radius Modeling. Formal reversal cost estimation before acceptance. blast_report_guard() enforces constitutional bounds at governance gate.
